global_description: A small, stocky seabird with a compact body and a distinctive crest. It has predominantly dark gray plumage with a lighter underbelly. The bird features a prominent orange bill and a unique forward-curving crest on its head. Its eyes are surrounded by a striking white eye-ring.

part_details.crest: Forward-curving, wispy, dark feathers on top of the head.
part_details.bill: Short, thick, bright orange with a slightly curved tip.
part_details.plumage: Dark gray with a lighter gray underbelly, smooth texture.
part_details.eye_ring: Thin, bright white circle surrounding the eye.

spatial_relations: The crest is positioned on top of the head, curving forward.
The orange bill protrudes from the front of the face.
The white eye-ring encircles the eye.
